top_signals.title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Wednesday
top_signals.summary: Stocks are headed for a lower open after President Trump said that Iran is taking too long to agree on a peace deal and must "pay the price."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chainalysis, South Korean police link up to fight crypto crime
top_signals.summary: South Korea's national police has been battling crypto-enabled crimes from DPRK-state level threats to scams targeting retail investors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: CISA to transform how it assesses cyber vulnerabilities and risks, Andersen says
top_signals.summary: A binding operational directive being released Wednesday will direct federal agencies to change the way they address vulnerabilities by elevating some while putting others to the side.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
